sections.sectionTitle: Jeremiah A Kisapna Leh A Kisawlna

verses.text: Benjamin gam Anathoth khua-a siampi khat ahi Hilkiah' tapa Jeremiah' thugente hih bang ahi hi
Amon' tapa Josiah, Judah gamah kumpi a suahzawh kum sawm leh kum thum a cin' kumin Topa in Jeremiah a hopih hi

Josiah' tapa Jehoiakim kumpi a suah ciangin Topa in Jeremiah a hopih leuleu hi. Tua khit ciangin Josiah' tapa Zedekiah kumpi a suahzawh kum sawm leh kum khat a phak kum, a kha ngana, Jerusalem khua mite sal tang dingin a kipuakkhiat dong tam veipi a hopihpih hi
Topa in kei hong hopih a
“Gil sungah kong bawl ma-in nang kong thei khinzo hi. Na suah ma-in nang kong teelkhia khinzo a, minam dangte tungah kamsang dingin kong koih khinzo hi,” hong ci hi
Tua ciangin keimah in, “Ah, Topa Pasian aw, kei thugen ka siam kei a, naupang khat ka hi lel hi,” ka ci hi
Ahih hangin Topa in, “ ‘Naupang khat ka hi lel hi,’ ci kei in; bang hang hiam cih leh kong puakna khempeuhte kiangah na pai ding a, kong sawl peuhpeuh na gen ding hi
Amaute kihta kei in; bang hang hiam cih leh nangmah a hong hu dingin ka hong ompih hi, Topa in kong ci hi,” hong ci hi
Tua ciangin Topa in a khut tawh hong zam phei-in ka muk hong lawn'sakin hong hopih hi. “En in, ka thute na kamsungah kong koih khinzo hi

Gam khempeuh leh kumpi khempeuhte' tungah a botkhia ding leh a phelkhia dingin ahi zongin, a susia ding leh a lawnkhia dingin ahi zongin, a lam ding leh a phut dingin ahi zongin, tuni-in za, nang kong piazo hi,” hong ci hi
Tua ciangin Topa in kei tungah, “Jeremiah aw, bang mu na hi hiam?” ci-in hong dong hi. Kei zong, “Ngak, a kici almond singhiang khat ka mu hi,” ci-in ka dawng hi
Tua ciangin Topa in, “Na man hi; bang hang hiam cih leh ka thugente ka tangtun'sakna dingin kei zong ka ngak hi,” hong ci hi
Topa in a nihveina hong hopih leuleu a, “Bang na mu hiam?” ci-in hong dong hi. Kei zong, “Beel a so khat ka mu a, leilu lam panin hong awnsuk hi,” ka ci hi
Tua ciangin Topa in, “Leilu lam panin hih gammi khempeuhte' tungah siatna hong sosuk ding hi

Bang hang hiam cih leh leilu lamah a om gam khempeuh keimah in ka sam a, amaute hong pai-in Jerusalem khua kongpite-ah ahi zongin, khua kimkota kulh kiimte-ah ahi zongin, Judah gam khuapi khempeuh kiimte-ah ahi zongin a kumpi tokhomte uh hong phut ciat ding uh hi
Ka mite in kei hong taisan uh ahih manin a mawhna uh hangin amau' tungah thu ka khen ding hi; pasian dangte tungah meihal biakna pia uh a, a khut uh tawh a bawlsa uh milimte a bia uh hi
Tua ahih manin Jeremiah aw, kithawi in. Pai in la kong sawl khempeuh amaute kiangah va gen in. Amaute kihta kei in; na kihtak leh amau' mai-ah kong lausakzaw lai ding hi

En in, hih gambup langah a ding ding, Judah kumpite, uliante, siampite leh hih gammi khempeuh langah a pang dingin tuni-in nang, khuapi muan'huai khat bang ahi zongin, sikkhuampi khat bangin ahi zongin, sumngo kulhpi khat bangin ahi zongin ka hong bawl hi
Amaute in nang' langkhatah hong do ding uh hi. Ahih hangin a hong zo kei ding uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in kong cihin-ah, nangmah a hong hu dingin ka hong ompih ding hi,” a hong ci hi.
